query: show me rework — follow-up work orders created on the same asset after a job finished
expected_behavior: Loads maximo-work-orders with maximo-overview as parent
Traces the originator->follow-up relationship via ORIGRECORDID/ORIGRECORDCLASS, NOT the PARENT (hierarchy) column
Notes that follow-ups live in separate hierarchies so their cost/labor do not roll up to the originator
Defers rework-RATE as a reliability KPI to maximo-reliability
